name: import-authority
description: Opinionated JavaScript/TypeScript import organizer for VS Code

scripts.compile: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js --production

importAuthority.sorting.placeTypeImports.description: Place type-only imports below non-type imports.

importAuthority.sorting.placeDefaultAndN.description: Place default and namespace imports below plain named imports.

importAuthority.sorting.groupImports.description: Insert blank lines between import groups (builtin, external, aliased, relative, type-only).

importAuthority.sorting.sideEffectPlacem.description: Place side-effect imports at the top or bottom of non-type imports.

importAuthority.sorting.moduleSpecifierO.description: Optional secondary sort key by module specifier after line-length sorting.

importAuthority.sorting.detectPathAliase.markdownDescription: Detect alias prefixes from nearest tsconfig/jsconfig `compilerOptions.paths.`

importAuthority.sorting.aliasPrefixes.markdownDescription: Additional alias prefixes used for grouped sorting (for example, `@app` or `~`).

importAuthority.style.semicolonPolicy.description: Whether organized imports should add semicolons, remove semicolons, or preserve existing semicolons.

importAuthority.style.typeImportStyle.description: Use import type declarations or inline type specifiers for type-only named imports.

importAuthority.style.namedImportsWrapTh.description: Wrap named imports to multiple lines when the unbroken import line length exceeds this value. Use 0 to disable wrapping.

importAuthority.style.alignFromKeyword.markdownDescription: Align `from` across single-line imports using spacing.

importAuthority.style.normalizeRelativeP.markdownDescription: Normalize relative module specifiers and collapse trailing `/index` segments.

importAuthority.unusedImports.useBuiltIn.markdownDescription: Remove unused imports using the language service before applying _Import Authority_ sorting rules.

importAuthority.unusedImports.useFallbac.description: When unused-import removal provider makes no edits or fails, run a heuristic file scan fallback to prune unused imports.

importAuthority.features.enableFormattin.markdownDescription: Enable _Import Authority_ as a document/range formatting provider.
